## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Fill in '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment Information

### Device/Browser

- **Device**: [e.g. iPhone 13, Desktop]
- **OS**: [e.g. iOS 16, macOS 13, Windows 11]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Safari 16, Chrome 108, Firefox 107]
- **Screen size**: [e.g. mobile, tablet, desktop]

### Application

- **Environment**: [e.g. Production (dorkbob.herokuapp.com), Development]
- **User Type**: [e.g. Authenticated user, Guest user]
- **Location Services**: [e.g. Enabled, Disabled, Denied]

## Error Details

### Console Errors

```
Paste any JavaScript console errors here
```

### Server Logs

```
Paste any relevant server logs here (if you have access)
```

### Network Issues

- [ ] Slow loading times
- [ ] Failed API requests
- [ ] Timeout errors

## Impact Assessment

- [ ] Blocking - Prevents core functionality
- [ ] High - Affects major features (search, favorites, reviews)
- [ ] Medium - Affects secondary features (user profile, navigation)
- [ ] Low - Minor UI/UX issues

## Feature Areas Affected

- [ ] Search functionality (Yelp API integration)
- [ ] User authentication (Google OAuth)
- [ ] Reviews and ratings
- [ ] Favorites management
- [ ] Navigation and routing
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness
- [ ] Location services (geolocation)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

### Workaround

If you found a temporary workaround, please describe it here.

### Related Issues

Link any related issues or discussions.
